name: agent_capability_computer_use_phase148c_local_browser_visible_terminal
prompt: Run the Phase148C local_browser controlled visible-terminal benchmark.
prompt_lines: Run the Phase148C local_browser controlled benchmark. Use only the project terminal command below. It may open only the controlled local browser test page and controlled project evidence files. Do not open login pages, payment pages, system settings, registry, installers, password managers, or private user documents.

You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE139_RUN_REAL_BROWSER_LOCAL_PAGE='1'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE139_ENABLE_REAL_BROWSER_LOCAL_PAGE='1'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.controlled_browser_live_local_page import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE139_CONTROLLED_BROWSER_LIVE_LOCAL_PAGE_OK, page_changed_after_real_click=true, screenshot_before_after_different=true, and real_desktop_touched=true, the final answer's last line must contain: PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_READY PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_OK family=local_browser PHASE139_CONTROLLED_BROWSER_LIVE_LOCAL_PAGE_OK page_changed_after_real_click=true screenshot_before_after_different=true browser_automation_used=false real_desktop_touched=true
